name: Homemade Mounds Bars2
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the corn syrup for 1 minute.
2. Add the chopped coconut and stir until combined.
3. Let sit for 2 hours at room temperature.
4. Wet your hands and form the mixture into balls.
5. Place the balls on a greased cookie sheet and refrigerate until firm.
6. Melt the chocolate chips and canning wax together in a microwave or double boiler.
7. Dip each coconut ball into the melted mixture, coating evenly.
8. Return to the cookie sheet and place back in the refrigerator until set.
